queue.title: Word-based verification challenge solver for Moltbook
queue.description: The current solveVerification() in moltbook-core.js only parses digit-based expressions via regex. Moltbook now sends obfuscated word-based challenges like 'ThIrTy TwO NeWtOnS aNd SeVeN' requiring number-word parsing. Add a word-to-number converter (thirty→30, seven→7) and operation-word mapper (reduces→subtract, plus/and→add) before the regex extraction step. Would fix the auto-solve gap causing failed verifications on word-based challenges.

outcome.note: Added wordsToMath() preprocessor with number word parsing (0-million), compound number assembly, operation word mapping, and mixed-case handling. 11 new tests, all 25 pass.

queue.title: Consolidate pre-session periodic hooks + absorb engagement-audit into E posthook
queue.description: Two consolidation groups from wq-742 audit: (1) Merge 02-periodic-evm-balance.sh (44 lines) + 02-periodic-platform-health.sh (27 lines) + 11-service-liveness.sh (22 lines) into single 02-periodic-checks.sh — all use identical interval-skip pattern, all write alert/log output, all non-session-type-conditional. Saves 2 hooks. (2) Absorb post/24-engagement-audit.sh (23 lines, E-only) into 36-e-session-posthook_E.sh — already E-only, checks for 0 log_engagement calls which fits as Phase N in the existing E mega-hook. Saves 1 hook. Total: 3 hooks saved.
